name: Aurizon Holdings Limited
analysis: AZJ has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$4.2581. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$4.2675 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$4.2581, stop A$4.0788, target A$4.4200. Risk/reward is 0.90:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
